depends_on.name: probe_id
depends_on.documentation: The unique ID of the probe document this location is associated with.

fields.name: ontology_name
fields.documentation: Ontology identifier of the probe's anatomical/functional location (e.g., 'UBERON:0002436', 'UBERON:0001880'). v1 ships this as a flat char field alongside `name`.

fields.name: name
fields.documentation: Human-readable name for the location (e.g., 'primary visual cortex', 'bed nucleus of stria terminalis (BNST)'). Paired with `ontology_name`.
